title: Add installer-wide progress bar
acceptanceCriteria: Interactive installer progress screen shows an aggregated step-count progress bar for the full install flow.
Completed progress counts only terminal steps (passed, warn, failed, skipped); running steps remain incomplete.
Long-running steps such as planned-port resolution visibly benefit from the shared progress bar without changing installer semantics.
Renderer and runtime regression coverage prove the bar appears during interactive install progress.
